title: VimFu — :s with Ranges
description: Substitute within a visual selection or line range.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
# Demo
old = 1
old = 2
old = 3
old = 4
old = 5

steps.say: You can limit substitution to a range of lines. Specify start and end line numbers.
Replace old with new, but only on lines two through four.
Three replacements on three lines. Lines five and six are untouched.
You can also use a visual selection. Select lines, then colon S, and Vim auto-fills the range.
Ranges. Target exactly the lines you want to change.
